description: a class with 'Handler' in its name that is a legitimate event-system handler, not a disguised service object — borderline pass
input:
class WebhookHandler
  SUPPORTED_EVENTS = %w[ payment.succeeded payment.failed subscription.cancelled ].freeze

  def initialize(payload)
    @payload = payload
  end

  def handle
    return unless SUPPORTED_EVENTS.include?(@payload[:event])
    send("handle_#{@payload[:event].tr('.', '_')}")
  end

  private

  def handle_payment_succeeded = Payment.find(@payload[:id]).mark_paid!
  def handle_payment_failed    = Payment.find(@payload[:id]).mark_failed!
  def handle_subscription_cancelled = Subscription.find(@payload[:id]).cancel!
end
